seoTitle: South Maitland vs South Murwillumbah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Maitland and South Murwillumbah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Maitland vs South Murwillumbah: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Maitland and South Murwillumbah.
heading: South Maitland vs South Murwillumbah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Maitland, New South Wales and South Murwillumbah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Murwillumbah has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to South Maitland (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Maitland or South Murwillumbah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Maitland has a flood risk score of 60/100, while South Murwillumbah scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Maitland scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. South Murwillumbah scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Maitland or South Murwillumbah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Murwillumbah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
